overview: Iuventus Medical Center provides customized treatments and healthcare services including medical weight loss, testosterone replacement therapy, hormone replacement, IV supplementation, and men's health programs.
highlights: IV drip therapies (Myers Cocktail, Glutathione, Vitamin C)
Medical weight loss programs (Semaglutide, Tirzepatide, HCG)
PRP therapy for erectile dysfunction and hair loss
targetAudience: Men seeking sexual health and testosterone treatments, and individuals interested in medical weight loss and wellness optimization.
